seed_problem: none (novel algebraic family; no classic decision-problem seed) - bespoke
mutation: goal: replace 'find any exact representation' with an open-ended minimization: given a target cyclotomic integer as a padded, non-negative strike-count vector over the n-th roots of unity, output a minimum-cardinality non-negative multiset of roots summing to the exact same ring element. The obvious floating-point angle-matching approach is a trap; the intended insight is the Lam-Leung theorem that every non-negative vanishing relation among n-th roots of unity decomposes into rotated full prime-order cycles, turning the search into an integer program over that prime-relation lattice.
theme: tune a chord using the fewest pure bell tones
title: Tuning a Chord with Pure Bell Tones
strategies: trivial: replay the given strike multiset verbatim (baseline)
greedy: floating-point matching pursuit toward the target's complex value, with an exactness-verified fallback to verbatim replay

strong: solves the full (signed) two-prime relation lattice as the LP dual of a min-cost transportation problem (min-cost flow between p-orbits and q-orbits, potentials read off the tight edges), falling back to alternating full exhaustion of each prime's cycles if the flow-derived voicing does not verify exactly -- finds re-voicings that borrow bells not in the original chord, not just subsets of it
